page_content:
PHYS624 Introduction to Quantum Field Theory (3 Credits)

Merging relativity and quantum mechanics using quantum fields,

scalar field theory and canonical quantization, continuous and discrete symmetries, perturbation theory and scattering amplitudes, renormalized perturbation theory, Lorentz-group representations and fermionic

field theories, massive and massless vector field theories and gauge invariance, quantum electrodynamics.
